03 · Milestones

Roadmap to launch & beyond

Launch Day 14 days

Today: May 1. Launch: May 15. Six clear phases — kept lean and realistic.

M1
Now

Foundation Week

May 1 – May 7

Lock the brand. Secure infrastructure. No public-facing posts yet.

Final logo Brand guidelines Domain + hosting Channel handles claimed Bio copy ready
M2

Build Week

May 8 – May 14

Production sprint — everything that needs to exist on launch day gets made now.

Website live (1-pager) Mascot finalised Hamper produced 10 launch reels shot & edited Founder intro filmed Meta Ads Manager configured
🚀
May 15

🚀Launch Day

Thursday · May 15

Synchronised brand reveal across every channel. One day, one story, one feeling.

Brand reveal post (all channels) Website goes public Hamper unboxing reel Founder welcome video Story sequence: behind-the-scenes First WhatsApp broadcast
M4

Momentum Phase

May 16 – May 31

Daily presence. First paid campaign. Get real data into the funnel.

Daily posting cadence active First Meta lead campaign live GBP optimised + 5 reviews WhatsApp catalog populated Lead response SOP in operation
M5

Optimise Phase

June

Two weeks of creative-data tells us what to double down on. First leads land.

Creative review & iteration Top reels re-cut as ads Builder / architect outreach First 30-lead milestone
M6

Scale Phase

July onwards

Compound. Open new content surfaces. Build a referral engine.

YouTube long-form launches Project case studies live Referral hamper program Second ad budget tier

08 · Content engine

Content strategy

A pre-built content bank rotated weekly. No last-minute scrambling.

📦 The Content Bank

Pre-plan 15–20 pieces, store, rotate weekly. Consistency without burnout.

20 evergreen pieces in inventory · refreshed monthly

🎥 Content types

Six formats covering education, proof, story and entertainment.

  • 🎙Founder talking videosAuthority · trust
  • 🏗Site execution walkthroughsProcess · craft
  • ✨Before / After transformationsProof · wow
  • 🎧Podcast-style discussionsDepth · POV
  • 📱Reels (educational + relatable)Reach · virality
  • 💬Client storytellingTestimonial · trust

10 · Workflow

Content workflow system

A repeatable monthly loop. Plan → batch → edit → schedule → measure → optimise.

1

Build content bank

Plan 15–20 video ideas tied to brand pillars and audience pain points.

2

Shoot in batches

1–2 days a month. Outfits, locations and props prepped in advance.

3

Edit weekly

One editor delivers 6–8 polished cuts a week with brand-consistent treatment.

4

Schedule ahead

Posts queued 2 weeks in advance — no last-minute publishing pressure.

5

Track performance

Weekly review of reach, saves, watch-time and lead source attribution.

6

Optimise monthly

Double down on what works. Kill underperformers. Refresh the bank.

11 · Paid

Ad strategy

Meta Lead Ads tuned for Chennai's premium homeowner segment.

Meta Lead Ads · Chennai

PlatformMeta (Facebook + Instagram)
FormatLead Form + Reel hooks
TargetChennai · 30 km radius
AudienceHomeowners · Builders · Premium
Age band28 – 50
Spend₹20,000 / month
CAC target₹400 – ₹650 / lead
Expected Leads · per month
30–60
Realistic, conservative range based on benchmarks

Scales linearly with budget once creative-market fit is confirmed.

11b · Start Slow

Start at ₹5K, scale when it works

No need to commit big upfront. Start with a test budget, see real leads come in, then scale confidently.

🌱 Starter — Month 1
12–30
leads expected · CPL ₹170–₹400
Ad Spend₹5,000
Reach25K – 50K people
Impressions40K – 75K
Profile Visits500 – 1,200
Engagement2% – 4%
Cost Per Lead₹170 – ₹400
Goal: test the creative, confirm targeting, collect first real leads before scaling.
🚀 Scale — Month 2 onwards
30–60
leads expected · CPL ₹400–₹650
Ad Spend₹20,000
Reach80K – 1,50,000 people
Impressions1.2L – 2.5L
Profile Visits2,000 – 5,000
Engagement3% – 6%
Cost Per Lead₹150 – ₹320
CPL drops in Month 2+ as Meta learns your audience. More budget = better data = lower cost per lead.
We only move to scale once Month 1 data confirms the campaign is working
11c · Meta Ads

Why Meta Ads — and how to run them

Click any section to expand. Everything in plain language.

📣
Why Meta Ads are non-negotiable right nowThe single fastest way to reach qualified buyers in your city

Organic content builds trust over time — but Meta Ads put you in front of the right people right now. In Chennai's premium segment, your potential customer is on Instagram daily.

  • Only platform where you can target homeowners + premium interest in one campaign
  • Lead Forms collect contact details without taking users off the app
  • Results are measurable — you know exactly how much each lead cost
  • Campaigns can be paused, scaled or redirected in 24 hours
📋
What you need before running adsThis checklist takes 1–2 days to complete
  • Meta Business Account — free to create, links your Facebook page + Instagram
  • Ads Manager access — we manage this on your behalf once access is granted
  • Payment method on file — card or UPI linked to the Ads Manager account
  • 1–2 creatives ready — a short video or a clean image with your project
⚙️
The process — how it works end to endFrom setup to your first lead arriving in your inbox
  1. Account Setup (Day 1) — Meta Business Manager created, Instagram + Facebook linked.
  2. Creative Brief (Day 1–2) — We finalise the ad creative: 1 short video reel + 1 static image.
  3. Lead Form Built (Day 2) — 3 questions max. Auto-filled name + phone for easy submission.
  4. Campaign Goes Live (Day 3) — First leads within 2–4 days typically.
  5. Weekly Optimisation — Pause underperformers, increase budget on winners.
  6. Monthly Report — How much spent, how many leads, cost per lead, next month recommendations.
💡 The first 7–10 days are the "learning phase" — Meta is finding your best audience.
📈
How we scale — the decision frameworkWe never increase budget blindly
  • Green signal to scale: CPL is within target range + at least 5 leads received in Month 1
  • Scale rule: Increase budget by max 20–30% per week
  • Red flag: If CPL is too high, we change the creative first — not the budget
🎯 "We will always start with a small test budget and scale based on performance."
